top_signals.title: China's CNOOC Starts Production at Bohai Sea Oilfield
top_signals.summary: China’s top offshore crude oil and natural gas producer, CNOOC, on Wednesday announced the launch of full production from phase one development of the Kenli 10-2 oilfield in the south Bohai Sea. The Kenli 10-2 oilfield cluster is China’s largest offshore shallow-layer lithological oilfield and will be developed in phases. Phase One now yields more than 20,500 barrels per day (bpd) of crude oil after full production started. The phase one development includes a new central processing platform, two unmanned wellhead platforms, and 79…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Millions to benefit from lower travel and food costs
top_signals.summary: The Government has published a list of 125 everyday essentials - including fruit, oils and core pantry staples - targeted for tariff reductions, alongside uprating mileage rates to support working people with the cost of living.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: US Mortgage Rates Climb to Highest Level Since August
top_signals.summary: US mortgage rates increased last week to the highest since August, restraining home-purchase activity and prompting a sharp pullback in refinancing.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Security researchers flag ongoing Stake DAO exploit after attacker mints trillions of vsdCRV
top_signals.summary: The attacker minted 5.4 trillion vsdCRV on Arbitrum and is actively swapping funds for ether, the researchers said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Foot Locker returns to growth but weighs on Dick's Sporting Goods as earnings miss
top_signals.summary: Since acquiring Foot Locker, Dick's Sporting Goods sales have surged, but its profitability has taken a hit given the high costs of the brand's turnaround.
